results.title: Karuppu Box Office Day 16: Suriya’s Blockbuster Eyes Vijay’s Varisu As Rs 300 Crore Milestone Nears
results.description: Suriya film Karuppu earns Rs 176.55 crore nett in India and over Rs 280 crore worldwide, nears Rs 300 crore and eyes surpassing Varisu to enter Tamil all time top 10.

results.title: Rachel Zegler, Francois Arnaud, Brittany Snow, Ciara Miller & More Attend Las Culturistas Culture Awards 2026 Taping
results.description: The stars were out for the filming of the 2026 Las Culturistas Culture Awards at The United Theater on Broadway [...] The post Rachel Zegler, Francois Arnaud, Brittany Snow, Ciara Miller & More Attend Las Culturistas Culture Awards 2026 Taping appeared first on Just Jared - Celebrity News and Gossip | Entertainment .
